## Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the entry template.
- [ ] I have verified that this API **currently** has a usable free or freemium tier.
- [ ] The docs/homepage link works and points to official documentation (not a blog, affiliate link, or tracking URL).
- [ ] The description is factual and concise — no marketing language or superlatives.
- [ ] The entry is placed **alphabetically** within the correct category.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and PRs to confirm this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] **Affiliation disclosure:** This is not my product / company. *(If it is, replace this line with a clear disclosure.)*
